description: The narrative voice, writing style, and perspective employed in a literary work.

name.description: A label or identifier for this style or voice

perspective.description: The point of view from which the story is told

voice_tone.description: The prevailing tone or attitude of the narration, e.g. formal, lyrical, colloquial, ironic

stylistic_markers.description: Recurring stylistic features such as sentence rhythm, diction, figurative language patterns

influences.description: Literary or cultural influences that shaped this writing style
